landing.title: Turn WhatsApp into a team inbox that sells
landing.subtitle: Conversa drafts replies with AI, keeps the whole conversation in context, and turns every chat into a lead in a drag-and-drop pipeline. Your entire team works the same inbox, live.
landing.beforeBody: Hi, do you build online stores? I need about 5 pages with payments, launching in 2 months, budget around $6,000.
landing.afterTitle: Conversa replies and creates the lead
landing.afterBody: AI drafts a tailored reply in seconds, tags the chat, sets a deal value, and drops it into your pipeline at "Qualified".
landing.feature1Body: Suggestions use the full thread plus a per-contact memory, so the AI stays on message. Insert with one click or let it auto-reply.
landing.feature2Body: Every contact is a lead. Move deals across stages, tag them, set a value, and watch the pipeline update in real time.
landing.feature3Body: Assign chats to teammates, leave internal notes, and see new messages arrive live across the whole team.
landing.feature4Body: Built on the official Cloud API webhook model with signature verification. A built-in simulator lets you try everything right now.
landing.step1Body: Plug in the WhatsApp Business Cloud API, or use the built-in simulator to try it instantly.
landing.step2Body: Inbound messages create a contact, and the AI drafts a context-aware reply your team can send or auto-send.
landing.step3Body: Tag, assign, and move each lead through your stages until it closes.
landing.ctaBody: Open the demo and message the inbox as a customer. No signup, no Meta account required.
landing.footerRights: Built for fast, human, AI-assisted customer conversations.
